data.title: Researcher finds counterfeit Ledger device on Chinese platform, linking it to Espressif Systems in firmware analysis.
data.description: The investigation into the counterfeit Ledger device's firmware revealed indicators linking to the Chinese semiconductor company Espressif Systems.

data.title: Analysts predict more gains for Bitcoin, with possible resistance near $78,000 based on active supply cost.
data.description: Market traders believe that Bitcoin still has the potential to increase in value, with projections indicating a possible rally. However, they note that there is a probable limit to this upward trend, indicating that the maximum point may be around $78,000, which is based on the current cost basis of BTC's active supply.

data.title: Ericsson reports first quarter results 2026
data.description: On April 17, 2026, in Stockholm, robust strategic execution was reported with a more balanced global footprint. The company achieved a strong organic sales growth of 6%, primarily driven by Networks, reflecting broadening customer demand across various regions. Additionally, AI native radios were introduced at the Mobile World Congress, expanding the company's product offerings.

data.title: KuCoin Institutional Strengthens OES Framework with Asseto's CASH+ and Expanded RWA Collateral Support
data.description: KuCoin Institutional recently introduced the incorporation of Asseto's leading product, CASH+, aimed at institutional clients in PROVIDENCIALES, Turks and Caicos Islands. This partnership allows clients to access yield-bearing collateral with enhanced capital efficiency. The integration offers significant benefits, including a higher return on investment and improved financial performance for institutional users. This strategic move is designed to provide increased opportunities for clients to optimize their assets and maximize yields, ultimately enhancing their overall financial portfolio.

data.title: Nagarro appoints Prateek Aggarwal as Chief Financial Officer and member of the Management Board
data.description: The recent appointment at Nagarro signifies a significant advancement in their finance leadership and governance. The newly appointed finance leader has substantial expertise working with various globally listed IT services companies. They are known for enhancing finance departments and achieving financial excellence on a large scale.

data.title: Samsung Bioepis Highlights Consistent Efficacy of SB16 (OBODENCE®; Denosumab) Across Osteoporosis Patient Subgroups at WCO-IOF-ESCEO 2026
data.description: Samsung Bioepis Co., Ltd. revealed recent data confirming the reliable efficacy of SB16 (OBODENCE®1), a biosimilar to Prolia2 (denosumab), in various patient subgroups compared to the reference denosumab. This information will be showcased through a poster presentation at the World Congress on Osteoporosis, Osteoarthritis, and Musculoskeletal Diseases (WCO-IOF-ESCEO) in Prague from April 16 to 19, 2026. Ensuring consistent efficacy across different patient subgroups is crucial for validating the pharmaceutical's effectiveness.

data.title: Carbios announces fiscal-year 2025 financial results
data.description: In Clermont-Ferrand, France, on April 17, 2026, at 7:45 am CEST, Carbios (Euronext Growth Paris: ALCRB) released its operational and financial outcomes for fiscal-year 2025. The financial data for December 31, 2025, were ratified by the Company's Board of Directors during their session on April 16, 2026.

data.title: Azenta (AZTA) Stock Drops 13% After-Hours — What's Happening?
data.description: Azenta Inc (NASDAQ: AZTA) stock is showing a downturn in after-hours trading due to the submission of a Form 3 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Azenta Life Sciences, a company specializing in life sciences tools to expedite the market entry of therapies and innovations, disclosed the form. Dated April 16, 2026, the filing reveals that William E. Martin III, President of Multiomics at Azenta, submitted an initial beneficial ownership statement under Section 16(a) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934. The document specifies that no securities are currently beneficially owned. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Gaxos (GXAI) Stock Surges Over 19% After Hours: Why Is It Moving?
data.description: Shares of Gaxos.ai Inc. (NASDAQ: GXAI) surged by 19.35% to $1.48 in post-market trading on Thursday following the company's announcement of expanding its Gaxos Labs platform with new AI tools including AI Music Generation, AI Chat, and AI 3D Model Creation. This move is part of Gaxos' strategy to enhance user engagement, diversify its generative AI offerings, and fortify its overall AI growth strategy. The expansion was revealed after the market closed on Thursday, with Gaxos aiming to strengthen its platform through image, video, music, and text-based AI tools tailored for various user segments like consumers, creators, and commercial users. The company reported a notable increase in user engagement across its AI portfolio post-expansion, attributing the rise to the new features. CEO Vadim Mats highlighted that these additions significantly broaden the platform's capabilities, meeting the rising demand for generative AI tools.
